name: Torta Di Ricotta (Italian Style Cheesecake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the butter into the flour until crumbly. Stir in egg and blend well.
2. Reserve about half of the mixture. Lightly pat the remaining crumbs into the bottom of a lightly greased 10-inch springform pan.
3. Beat the ricotta cheese until creamy. Add 1 cup sugar, then beat in the flour and egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla and candied fruit, mixing thoroughly.
4. Beat the egg whites until stiff. Gradually add the remaining sugar while continuing to beat. Gently fold this into the ricotta mixture.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle with reserved crumbs. Bake at 325°F for about 1 hour and 30 minutes, or until firm. Let cool in the pan. Serves 10-12.
